root.sql:
SELECT tax_date , tax_seq , c_text , ( '401N' || '|' || trim( (row_number() over ())::text) || '|' || c_text ) as c_tax from (
SELECT tax_date , tax_seq , c_text , ( '401N' || '|' || trim( (row_number() over ())::text) || '|' || c_text ) as c_tax from ( select sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_date ,sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_seq ,( sc_fin_send_tax_hr.id_card || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_hr.prename || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_hr.memname || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_hr.memsurname || '|' || pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_date ,'ddmmyyyy') || '|' || trim( to_char( sc_fin_send_tax_hr.paid_amount ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || trim( to_char( sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_amount ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || '1' ) as c_text FROM sc_fin_send_tax_hr WHERE 1=1 and paid_amount > 0 /*WHERE*/ and sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_date between '!tax_date_1!' and '!tax_date_2!' ORDER BY sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_date , sc_fin_send_tax_hr.tax_seq ) tb
union all
SELECT tax_date , tax_seq , c_text , ( '401N' || '|' || trim( (row_number() over ())::text) || '|' || c_text ) as c_tax from ( select sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_date ,sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_seq ,( sc_fin_send_tax_fin.id_card || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_fin.prename || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_fin.memname || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_fin.memsurname || '|' || pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_date ,'ddmmyyyy') || '|' || trim( to_char( sc_fin_send_tax_fin.paid_amount ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || trim( to_char( sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_amount ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || '1' ) as c_text FROM sc_fin_send_tax_fin WHERE 1=1 /*WHERE*/ and sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_date between '!tax_date_1!' and '!tax_date_2!' ORDER BY sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_date , sc_fin_send_tax_fin.tax_seq )) tb
